ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "solution_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy solution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "needs" INTEGER /* Number of requirements for the policy */,
  "premium_input" TEXT /* Premium input for the policy */,
  "validation_error" TEXT /* Validation error message for the policy */,
  "allow_edit" TEXT /* Flag to indicate if the policy can be edited */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy configuration */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the configuration belongs to */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy configuration */,
  "configuration_value" TEXT /* Value of the policy configuration */,
  "config_category" TEXT /* Category of the policy configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the policy configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_configurations_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy requirement */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the requirement belongs to */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy requirement */,
  "requirement_value" TEXT /* Value of the policy requirement */,
  "requirement_category" TEXT /* Category of the policy requirement */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the policy requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_requirements_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy validation */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the validation belongs to */,
  "validation_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy validation */,
  "validation_value" TEXT /* Value of the policy validation */,
  "validation_category" TEXT /* Category of the policy validation */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the policy validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_validations_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies_customers" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy purchased */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the policy */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was purchased */,
  "policy_premium" TEXT /* Premium amount paid by the customer for the policy */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Payment frequency of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id", "customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the policy administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the policy administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the policy administrator */,
  "admin_password" TEXT /* Password of the policy administrator (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the administrator's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the claim belongs to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" TEXT /* Amount claimed by the customer */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_claims_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the payment belongs to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_payments_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
